case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ELLA HENDRICKS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 188 KISKA ROAD, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED DEC-30-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, ELLA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
